prompt: Logo wordmark on transparent background with NO background color at all. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase, all in solid bright yellow (#FAFA00). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Every letter — M, A, G, E, N, C, Y — is the SAME font, same weight, same style. Wide rectangular letterforms, thick strokes, sharp 90-degree corners, minimal counter space. Tight letter-spacing. The period dot is also yellow. No icon, no symbol. Pure heavy typography. Vector quality, crisp edges, completely flat. PNG with alpha transparency, no background whatsoever.
negative_prompt: background color, solid background, black background, white background, icon, symbol, graphic, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, different fonts for different words, mixed typefaces, rounded font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge
